acceptanceCriteria: Given a completed ground-defence patrol, When the company compiles the patrol report (CC-8), Then it is submitted to Wing Ops as input to the intelligence assessment at the main base
Given each unit on main base KAX, When it submits its daily report (dygnsrapport) by 1100LT, Then PEDARS, function status and combat-value status are reported to the unit chief
Given the unit chief with DUC, When the ILM order meeting is held at 1300LT, Then the consolidated daily report is presented to Wing Ops

Given the submitted unit and patrol reports, When Current Ops (A3) consolidates them, Then the wing situation picture (lägessammanställning) is updated and disseminated as own situation, intel/security situation and assessed enemy situation

Given the updated situation picture, When Current Ops compiles the wing report (förbandsrapport) using the FVC/SOFO NAT template, Then a draft wing report covering the whole war unit is ready for approval
Given a drafted wing report, When the Chief of Staff (or successor in line) approves it, Then it is released for submission to higher command
Given an approved wing report, When it is submitted, Then higher command (FVC/FS) receives the förbandsrapport no later than 1500LT

ListDailyReports.description: All daily reports submitted for the period, used by Current Ops to consolidate the situation picture.

ListPatrolReports.description: Patrol reports for the period, feeding the intelligence picture.

GetSituationPicture.description: Latest consolidated situation picture used to brief the commander, support the decision and compile the wing report.

GetWingReport.description: The drafted wing report under review before approval and submission to higher command.

DailyReport.description: Dygnsrapport submitted by a subordinate unit (DUC) covering its status for the period; carries PEDARS, function status and combat-value status.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the daily report

fields.name: periodFrom
fields.description: Start of the reporting period (time number)

fields.name: periodTo
fields.description: End of the reporting period (time number)

fields.name: commanderSummary
fields.description: Chief's summary of essential and limiting factors

fields.name: pedars
fields.description: PEDARS line (personnel, replacement, fuel, ammunition, repairs, combat value)

PatrolReport.description: Patrullrapport (CC-8) compiled at company level from a ground-defence patrol; feeds the intelligence assessment at the main base.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the patrol report

fields.name: periodFrom
fields.description: Start time number of the patrol

fields.name: periodTo
fields.description: End time number of the patrol

fields.name: submittedAt
fields.description: Time the patrol report was submitted

SituationPicture.description: Consolidated wing situation picture (lagessammanstallning) maintained by Current Ops from received reports; own situation, intel/security situation and assessed enemy situation.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the situation picture snapshot

fields.name: asOf
fields.description: Timestamp the picture is valid as of

WingReport.description: Forbandsrapport sent daily from the wing to higher command (FVC/FS) reporting the status of the war unit as a whole, using the FVC/SOFO NAT template.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the wing report

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle status of the wing report

fields.name: ownPositionAssessment
fields.description: Position, situation and conclusions for the war unit as a whole

PedarsStatus.description: Value object capturing the PEDARS line of a daily report: personnel, replacement, fuel, ammunition, repairs and overall combat value.

fields.name: combatValue
fields.description: Overall combat value (Stridsvarde): RED, YELLOW or GREEN

FunctionStatus.description: Value object capturing the function report (funktionsrapport) section of a daily report.

ReadinessAssessment.description: Value object for one capability line of the combat-value report (stridsvardesrapport), e.g. command, mobility, effect, protection, endurance, intelligence.

fields.name: area
fields.description: Capability area (Ledning, Rorlighet, Verkan, Skydd, Uthallighet, Underrattelse, Transporttjanst)

fields.name: status
fields.description: Capability status: RED, YELLOW or GREEN

PatrolObservation.description: Value object for a single chronological observation in a patrol report (Stund, Stalle, Sysselsattning, Sagesman).

acceptanceCriteria: Given the wing battle-rhythm schedule, When the scheduled start time (0500Z) is reached, Then a new operations day (dygn) is opened and the day watch is activated
Given the night watch (Jour VB) has maintained the situation overnight, When the day watch assumes duty, Then the watch is handed over with current status and standing tasks briefed
Given the current situation, When the Chief of Staff (SC) updates the Wing Commander once per day (chefens uppdatering), Then the commander has a current picture for decisions

Given the commander's update and base order have been given, When the Chief of Staff holds the SC coordination meeting with department chiefs, Then a common situational understanding and resource priorities are established
Given the decision brief at the decision meeting (beslutsföredragning), When the Wing Commander decides, Then the chosen course of action is recorded for order production
Given the commander's decision, When the Chief of Staff approves the order (FljO/FragO), Then it is issued to DUC over TAKTIL in connection with the 1300LT order meeting
Given the end of the day shift, When the night watch (Jour VB) assumes duty, Then the watch is handed over with current status and standing tasks
Given all daily reporting for the period is complete, When the operations day ends, Then it is closed and the next day's battle-rhythm cycle is scheduled
Given a resolved incident or a battle-staff decision that falls outside the standing order, When it occurs, Then A3 records it in the war diary (krigsdagbok) in TAKTIL for traceability

GetOrder.description: The decided order awaiting approval and issue.

GetOperationsDay.description: Current operations-day status and standing tasks, used to brief the incoming watch.

OperationsDay.description: The recurring battle-rhythm cycle (dygn) for Wing Ops; opened on schedule at shift start and closed at day end, framing the daily reporting tick.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the operations day

fields.name: dayDate
fields.description: Calendar date of the operations day

fields.name: startsAt
fields.description: Scheduled start of the day cycle (shift start)

fields.name: endsAt
fields.description: Scheduled end of the day cycle

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle status of the operations day

fields.name: dailyReportingComplete
fields.description: Whether all daily reporting for the period is complete

fields.name: nextDayScheduledAt
fields.description: Scheduled start of the next day's cycle

WatchHandover.description: Skiftavlosning between the day watch and night watch (Jour VB) in Wing Ops, transferring current status and standing tasks.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the watch handover

fields.name: outstandingMatters
fields.description: Standing tasks and open matters briefed at handover

CommanderUpdate.description: Chefens uppdatering: the once-per-day briefing in which the Chief of Staff updates the Wing Commander on the situation.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the commander update

CoordinationMeeting.description: SC koordineringsmote held with department chiefs to align the situational picture and resource priorities.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the coordination meeting

Order.description: A wing order (FljO) or fragmentary order (FragO) decided by the Wing Commander and issued by the Chief of Staff to subordinate units over TAKTIL.

fields.name: decision
fields.description: The commander's decision the order implements

WarDiaryEntry.description: Krigsdagbok entry kept by A3 in TAKTIL, recording battle-staff decisions and events outside the standing order for traceability.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the war diary entry

fields.name: eventTimeNumber
fields.description: Time number of the event being recorded

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category of entry (decision, incident, out-of-order event)

fields.name: entryText
exampleData: UAS over platta 2, alarm force dispatched
C F 21 decided to reinforce C-UAS

acceptanceCriteria: Given an observed event on or around the base, When a unit reports it immediately on the incident channel, Then Wing Ops registers the incident using the relevant template (8S event report, METHANE for mass casualty, or the UAS report)
Given a UAS observation, When reported per CC-7, Then the C-UAS 5C handling (Confirm, Clear, Cordon, Communicate, Control) is initiated

Given an incoming incident report, When FP Ops assesses it, Then support resources are allocated even beyond the ordered standby alarm forces (fire, medical, defence) and the appropriate command net (MF, SJV, R3 or TP) is assigned
Given allocated support resources, When FP Ops dispatches the alarm force, Then it responds on the assigned command net
Given a dispatched response, When the incident is handled, Then it is resolved and the outcome is confirmed to Wing Ops

GetIncident.description: Reported incident details used by FP Ops to allocate resources and by the duty officer to resolve it.

GetSupportTasking.description: The support tasking with allocated resources, used to dispatch the alarm force.

Incident.description: An event-driven incident reported on the incident channel (8S event report, METHANE mass-casualty report, or UAS report) and tracked by Wing Ops to resolution.

fields.name: incidentType
fields.description: Type of incident and report template used

SupportTasking.description: Allocation and dispatch of support resources (fire, medical, defence) by FP Ops in response to an incident, on the assigned command net.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the support tasking

fields.name: incident
fields.description: The incident this tasking responds to

fields.name: dispatchedAt
fields.description: Time the alarm force was dispatched

AllocatedResource.description: Value object for a support resource allocated to an incident (e.g. fire, medical or defence element) with its callsign and quantity.

acceptanceCriteria: Given CAOC Bodö publishes the ATO/ACO/SPINS for the day, When it arrives over NS WAN, Then A3 WOC registers the air tasking order in Wing Ops
Given a registered air tasking order, When STEX distributes it, Then flying units and affected DUC receive their tasking

GetAirTaskingOrder.description: The received air tasking order to be distributed to flying units.

AirTaskingOrder.description: The ATO/ACO/SPINS received from CAOC Bodo over NS WAN and distributed to flying units; drives the day's flight operations.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the air tasking order

fields.name: atoDate
fields.description: Date the ATO is valid for
